title: Python Fundamentals
description: Master Python basics including variables, control flow, functions, and file handling. Build a solid foundation for backend development and data science.

title: HTML, CSS & JavaScript Bootcamp
description: Learn to build responsive web pages from scratch using modern HTML5, CSS3, and vanilla JavaScript with DOM manipulation.

title: React.js Frontend Development
description: Build modern single-page applications with React. Covers components, hooks, state management, routing, and API integration.

title: Data Analysis with Python
description: Perform exploratory data analysis, data cleaning, and visualization using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib on real-world datasets.

title: Statistics for Data Science
description: Core statistical concepts including probability, distributions, hypothesis testing, and regression analysis for data-driven decision making.

title: Machine Learning with Scikit-Learn
description: Implement supervised and unsupervised ML algorithms including linear regression, decision trees, random forests, and k-means clustering.

title: Deep Learning & Neural Networks
description: Build neural networks from scratch and with TensorFlow/Keras. Cover CNNs, RNNs, transfer learning, and model optimization.

title: Natural Language Processing
description: Process and analyze text data with NLP techniques including tokenization, sentiment analysis, named entity recognition, and transformer models.

title: AWS Cloud Practitioner Essentials
description: Understand AWS cloud services, pricing models, security fundamentals, and architecture best practices for the cloud practitioner certification.

title: Docker & Kubernetes Mastery
description: Containerize applications with Docker and orchestrate deployments with Kubernetes. Covers images, pods, services, and Helm charts.

title: Linux System Administration
description: Master Linux command line, file systems, process management, networking, shell scripting, and system security fundamentals.

title: Network Security & Ethical Hacking
description: Learn network security principles, vulnerability assessment, penetration testing, and ethical hacking methodologies using industry tools.

title: SQL & Database Design
description: Design relational databases, write complex SQL queries, normalize data, and work with PostgreSQL and MySQL in production environments.

title: NoSQL with MongoDB & Redis
description: Explore document-based and key-value databases. Build applications with MongoDB for flexible schemas and Redis for caching and real-time data.

title: UI/UX Design Principles
description: Learn user-centered design, wireframing, prototyping with Figma, accessibility standards, and design system creation.

title: FastAPI Backend Development
description: Build high-performance REST APIs with FastAPI. Covers Pydantic validation, async endpoints, middleware, authentication, and OpenAPI docs.

title: MLOps & Model Deployment
description: Deploy ML models to production with MLOps best practices. Covers model serving, monitoring, CI/CD for ML, and cloud deployment strategies.

title: Git & GitHub Workflow
description: Master version control with Git and collaborative development on GitHub. Covers branching, merging, pull requests, rebasing, and CI/CD integration.

title: GraphQL API Development
description: Design and build flexible APIs with GraphQL. Covers schema design, resolvers, subscriptions, authentication, and integration with React frontends.

title: React Native Mobile Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps for iOS and Android using React Native. Covers navigation, state management, native modules, and app store deployment.

title: CI/CD Pipelines with GitHub Actions
description: Automate build, test, and deployment workflows using GitHub Actions. Covers workflow syntax, secrets management, matrix builds, and self-hosted runners.

title: Python for Everybody
description: Learn to program and analyze data with Python. Start from the basics and progress to web scraping, databases, and data visualization.

title: Python Data Structures
description: Dive deeper into Python data structures including strings, lists, dictionaries, and tuples. Master data manipulation and processing patterns.

title: Programming for Everybody
description: An introductory course for people with no programming experience. Learn the basics of Python and computational thinking.

title: Java Programming Basics
description: Learn Java from scratch. Covers object-oriented programming, data structures, GUI development, and handling large datasets.

title: Object Oriented Programming in Java
description: Master object-oriented programming concepts in Java. Covers classes, inheritance, polymorphism, interfaces, and design patterns.

title: C Programming Basics
description: Learn the fundamentals of C programming language. Covers variables, data types, operators, control flow, functions, and arrays.

title: C++ Programming
description: Learn C++ programming from basics to advanced concepts. Covers OOP, STL, memory management, and modern C++ features.

title: JavaScript Algorithms and Data Structures
description: Master JavaScript fundamentals, ES6 features, regular expressions, debugging, and data structures including arrays, objects, and maps.

title: Responsive Web Design
description: Learn modern CSS flexbox, CSS grid, and responsive design principles. Build accessible web pages and web applications.

title: Front End Development Libraries
description: Build dynamic user interfaces with React, Redux, Bootstrap, jQuery, and Sass. Master modern front-end frameworks and libraries.

title: Back End Development & APIs
description: Learn back-end development with Node.js, Express, and MongoDB. Build RESTful APIs, handle authentication, and manage databases.

title: Relational Databases
description: Learn relational database design, SQL queries, PostgreSQL, and Bash scripting. Build projects to master database administration.

title: Data Visualization
description: Create visual representations of data using D3.js, SVG, and CSS. Build charts, graphs, maps, and interactive dashboards.

title: Machine Learning with Python
description: Learn machine learning fundamentals using Python. Build models with TensorFlow, handle data with NumPy, and create visualizations with Matplotlib.

title: Data Analysis with Python
description: Analyze real-world datasets using Python. Covers Pandas, NumPy, Matplotlib, and data cleaning, import, and preparation techniques.

title: TensorFlow Tutorial
description: Learn TensorFlow from scratch. Build and train neural networks, work with tensors, and deploy ML models for various applications.

title: NumPy Tutorial
description: Master NumPy for numerical computing in Python. Covers arrays, broadcasting, linear algebra, and performance optimization techniques.

title: Pandas Tutorial
description: Learn Pandas for data manipulation and analysis in Python. Covers DataFrames, Series, groupby, merging, and time series operations.

title: Power BI for Beginners
description: Create interactive dashboards and reports with Power BI. Learn data modeling, DAX formulas, visualizations, and sharing insights.

title: SQL for Data Science
description: Learn SQL for data science applications. Covers queries, joins, subqueries, functions, and creating datasets for analysis.

title: MongoDB Basics
description: Get started with MongoDB. Learn document databases, CRUD operations, indexing, aggregation, and data modeling patterns.

title: Redis University RU101
description: Introduction to Redis data structures and server concepts. Learn strings, hashes, lists, sets, and sorted sets for caching and real-time apps.

title: GitHub Foundations
description: Learn GitHub fundamentals including repositories, branches, commits, pull requests, and collaboration workflows for modern development.

title: Git Fundamentals
description: Master Git version control. Learn commits, branches, merging, rebasing, and resolving conflicts for efficient code management.

title: Azure Fundamentals
description: Explore Azure cloud concepts, core services, pricing, SLA, and governance. Prepare for the AZ-900 certification exam.

title: Azure AI Fundamentals
description: Discover AI workloads and considerations on Azure. Learn about machine learning, computer vision, NLP, and document intelligence services.

title: Azure Data Fundamentals
description: Learn core data concepts and how they relate to Azure data services. Explore relational and non-relational databases, analytics, and visualization.

title: Docker for the Absolute Beginner
description: Learn Docker from scratch. Master containers, images, Dockerfiles, volumes, networking, and Docker Compose through hands-on labs.

title: Kubernetes Basics
description: Official Kubernetes interactive tutorials. Learn pods, deployments, services, scaling, and how to deploy containerized applications.

title: Linux Journey
description: An interactive guide to learning Linux. Covers the command line, file permissions, users and groups, networking, and shell scripting.

title: Introduction to Linux
description: A comprehensive introduction to Linux. Explore the command line, file systems, process management, and basic system administration.

title: Google AI Essentials
description: Learn AI fundamentals from Google. Understand how AI works, use AI tools responsibly, and develop practical AI skills for any career.

title: Prompt Engineering for ChatGPT
description: Master prompt engineering techniques for large language models. Learn to design effective prompts, chain-of-thought reasoning, and fine-tune interactions.

title: Generative AI Fundamentals
description: Explore the foundations of generative AI. Learn about large language models, diffusion models, generative adversarial networks, and real-world applications.

title: AI Engineering
description: Learn to build and deploy AI-powered applications. Covers AI engineering principles, model integration, APIs, and production-ready AI systems.

title: Cybersecurity Essentials
description: Learn essential cybersecurity concepts. Understand cyber threats, vulnerabilities, network defense, and security operations fundamentals.

title: Networking Basics
description: Learn fundamental networking concepts. Explore protocols, IP addressing, network devices, topologies, and basic network configuration.

title: Ethical Hacker
description: Introduction to ethical hacking. Learn penetration testing methodologies, security tools, and how to identify and report vulnerabilities.

title: Introduction to Packet Tracer
description: Learn network simulation with Cisco Packet Tracer. Build, configure, and troubleshoot virtual networks in an interactive environment.

title: Introduction to DevOps
description: Explore DevOps culture and practices. Learn about CI/CD, infrastructure as code, automation, monitoring, and collaboration between development and operations.

title: Cloud Computing Fundamentals
description: Understand cloud computing essentials. Learn about cloud service models, deployment models, virtualization, and major cloud platforms.

title: Data Science Foundations
description: Build a strong foundation in data science. Learn the data science lifecycle, methodologies, tools, and how to approach real-world data problems.

title: Hugging Face NLP Course
description: Learn NLP with Hugging Face transformers. Fine-tune pre-trained models for text classification, named entity recognition, and question answering.

title: Hugging Face LLM Course
description: Master large language models. Learn LLM architecture, prompt engineering, fine-tuning, RLHF, quantization, and building LLM-powered applications.

title: Hugging Face Deep RL Course
description: Learn deep reinforcement learning. Master Q-learning, policy gradients, PPO, and multi-agent RL through hands-on coding assignments.

title: Google Cloud Computing Foundations
description: Get started with Google Cloud. Learn core compute, storage, networking services, and how to manage resources in the Google Cloud Console.

title: Introduction to Vertex AI
description: Learn to build, deploy, and manage ML models on Google Cloud Vertex AI. Covers AutoML, custom training, and model monitoring.

title: Data Engineering on Google Cloud
description: Build data pipelines on Google Cloud. Learn BigQuery, Dataflow, Pub/Sub, and how to design scalable data processing architectures.

title: Machine Learning Crash Course
description: Google's fast-paced introduction to machine learning. Covers linear regression, neural networks, classification, overfitting, and ML best practices.

title: Web Accessibility Fundamentals
description: Learn web accessibility standards and best practices. Understand WCAG guidelines, ARIA roles, semantic HTML, and inclusive design patterns.

title: Anthropic AI Learning Hub
description: Learn about AI safety, constitutional AI, and responsible AI development from the creators of Claude. Explore courses on AI alignment and safety research.

title: OpenAI Academy
description: Official OpenAI learning platform. Master prompt engineering, API integration, and building applications with GPT models and the OpenAI platform.

title: Google AI Learning
description: Google's AI learning resources. Explore AI fundamentals, TensorFlow, machine learning, and Google Cloud AI tools for career growth.

title: Meta AI Learning Resources
description: Meta's AI educational resources. Learn about PyTorch, computer vision, NLP, and AI research from Meta's AI team.

title: NVIDIA Developer Training
description: NVIDIA's developer training programs. Master GPU computing, CUDA, deep learning, and AI acceleration with hands-on labs and certification paths.

title: Microsoft AI Learning Paths
description: Microsoft's comprehensive AI learning paths. Cover Azure AI services, Copilot, responsible AI, and building intelligent applications.

title: IBM AI SkillsBuild
description: IBM's free AI learning platform. Explore generative AI, machine learning, NLP, and AI ethics with hands-on projects and badges.

title: AWS AI Skill Builder
description: AWS's AI learning platform. Master Amazon Bedrock, SageMaker, AI/ML services, and building scalable AI solutions on AWS cloud.

title: DeepLearning.AI Courses
description: Andrew Ng's DeepLearning.AI platform. Access courses on deep learning, generative AI, MLOps, and AI for everyone with industry-leading instruction.

title: Hugging Face AI Learning
description: Hugging Face's comprehensive AI courses. Master transformers, NLP, deep reinforcement learning, LLMs, and building AI-powered applications.

title: Python for Data Science, AI & Development
description: IBM's Python course for data science. Learn Python basics, data structures, Pandas, NumPy, APIs, and web scraping for AI and development.

title: SQL for Data Analytics
description: Learn SQL for data analytics on edX. Master queries, joins, subqueries, window functions, and database management for data-driven roles.

title: Statistics and R
description: Learn statistics fundamentals using R. Cover descriptive statistics, probability distributions, hypothesis testing, and confidence intervals.

title: Data Science: R Basics
description: Harvard's introductory R course. Build a foundation in R programming, data wrangling with dplyr, and visualization with ggplot2.

title: Excel and Power BI for Data Analysis
description: Master Excel and Power BI for data analysis. Learn data modeling, DAX formulas, pivot tables, and creating interactive business dashboards.

title: Data Science: Visualization
description: Harvard's data visualization course. Learn visualization principles, ggplot2, and how to communicate data-driven findings effectively.

title: Data Science: Building Machine Learning Models
description: Harvard's machine learning course for data science. Build recommendation systems, learn cross-validation, regularization, and popular ML algorithms.

title: R Programming for Data Science
description: Master R programming for data science. Learn data structures, control flow, functions, debugging, and code organization in R.

title: Introduction to Tableau
description: Learn Tableau for data visualization. Master data preparation, joins, unions, relationships, and building interactive dashboards in Tableau Public.

title: Microsoft Power BI Data Analyst
description: Master Power BI for data analysis. Learn data modeling, DAX measures, Power Query, report building, and deployment to the Power BI service.

title: Data Science: Productivity Tools
description: Harvard's productivity tools course. Learn Unix/Linux, version control with git and GitHub, and reproducible reports with RStudio and R Markdown.

title: Data Science: Probability
description: Harvard's probability course for data science. Learn random variables, Monte Carlo simulations, expected values, and the Central Limit Theorem.

title: Mathematics for Data Science
description: MathWorks MATLAB Academy courses. Learn linear algebra, calculus, statistics, and machine learning using MATLAB for data science applications.

title: Statistics for Data Science
description: Master statistics fundamentals for data science. Cover probability, distributions, hypothesis testing, sampling, and the Central Limit Theorem.

title: Data Visualization with Python
description: IBM's data visualization course with Python. Create charts, maps, and interactive dashboards using Matplotlib, Seaborn, Folium, and Plotly.

title: Machine Learning Specialization
description: Andrew Ng's Machine Learning Specialization by Stanford and DeepLearning.AI. Master supervised learning, neural networks, decision trees, and unsupervised learning.

title: Deep Learning Specialization
description: Andrew Ng's Deep Learning Specialization. Master CNNs, RNNs, LSTMs, Transformers, and build deep learning applications with TensorFlow.

title: Data Science: Linear Regression
description: Harvard's linear regression course. Learn to implement linear regression in R, handle confounding, and analyze relationships between variables.

title: Data Science: Wrangling
description: Harvard's data wrangling course. Learn to import, tidy, and process raw data using R. Cover string processing, web scraping, and text mining.

title: Introduction to Linear Algebra
description: Learn linear algebra fundamentals. Cover vectors, matrices, linear transformations, eigenvalues, and applications in data science and machine learning.

title: Probability and Statistics
description: Master probability and statistics concepts. Cover probability rules, distributions, regression analysis, and statistical inference for data science.

title: Introduction to Linear Models and Matrix Algebra
description: Harvard's linear models course. Learn to use R for matrix algebra, linear models, and applications in life sciences and data analysis.

title: Data Science: Capstone
description: Harvard's data science capstone project. Apply all skills from the Professional Certificate program to a real-world data analysis challenge.

title: Data Analysis with Python
description: IBM's data analysis course with Python. Master data cleaning, EDA, regression models, and data visualization using Pandas, NumPy, and Scikit-learn.

title: IBM Data Science Professional Certificate
description: IBM's comprehensive data science certificate. Master Python, SQL, data visualization, machine learning, and build a portfolio of data science projects.

title: Neural Networks and Deep Learning
description: First course of the Deep Learning Specialization. Learn to build, train, and apply deep neural networks with TensorFlow by Andrew Ng.

title: Supervised Machine Learning: Regression and Classification
description: First course of the Machine Learning Specialization. Build ML models with NumPy and scikit-learn. Master linear regression, logistic regression, and regularization.
